node.data: {"V1294":{"lit":"հեռա<lb xml:id=\"l104429719\" facs=\"#z104429719\" n=\"14\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ցուցանել","line":{"facs":"#z104429718","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104429718","n":"13"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9121"},"n":"հեռացուցանել"},"M36":{"lit":"հեռացուցանել","context":"text/body/ab[133]","n":"հեռացուցանել"},"M8076":{"lit":"հեռացուցանել","line":{"facs":"#z104127704","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104127704","n":"26"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8076.0383"},"n":"հեռացուցանել"},"V31":{"lit":"հեռացուցանել","line":{"facs":"#z104330394","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104330394","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_132541 copy"},"n":"հեռացուցանել"},"M695":{"lit":"հեռացուցանել","line":{"facs":"#z103921208","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103921208","n":"7"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-335a"},"n":"հեռացուցանել"},"M7227":{"lit":"հեռա<lb xml:id=\"l103964149\" facs=\"#z103964149\" n=\"6\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ցուցանել","line":{"facs":"#z103964150","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103964150","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-056a"},"n":"հեռացուցանել"}}
